name: note-variant-canonical-audit
description: Audit Mojo production files for non-canonical # NOTE variants: wrong issue/version order, missing version tag, or TODO-style notes masquerading as limitation notes. Use when: (1) a follow-up cleanup issue targets production shared/ files after a prior audit addressed test/example files, (2) grep shows mixed (version, #issue) vs (#issue, version) ordering, (3) limitation NOTEs lack version tags.
